Great focus, helping teams turn AI visibility into real content is very relevant as AI becomes a key discovery channel. This looks especially useful for marketing teams and everyday content needs.

One thing that could make it even better is more customization for each AI model, since every model shows content differently. Good stuff! 👍🏽

Gary Ng

Strong positioning in the emerging GEO space, with useful insights into AI search visibility and tools to optimize content for generative engines. Helps teams stay ahead as search shifts beyond traditional SEO
